fields.description: The regional wildcard zone the proxy fleet terminates, e.g. blr1.frappe.dev. A site's routing FQDN is <label>.<domain>. Unique; the routing key the guest API builds every FQDN from.
fields.label: Domain

fields.description: This region's identifier (e.g. blr1). The cert-dir scope on every proxy guest and the region this domain fronts.
fields.label: Region

fields.description: Exactly one Region Domain is active. The guest routing API resolves the region suffix from the single active row; the reconcile fails loud when none or several are active.
fields.label: Is Active

fields.description: The TLS issuer for this region's wildcard cert. Resolved via satellite.tls.for_tls_provider_type.
fields.label: TLS Provider Type

fields.description: The DNS vendor that answers DNS-01 and holds the regional wildcard zone. Resolved via satellite.dns.for_dns_provider_type.
fields.label: DNS Provider Type
